name: Scallops Ageganata
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, combine crumbs, parsley, oregano, and lemon peel. Add margarine and mix well until thoroughly moistened. Set aside.
2. Preheat the broiler.
3. Place scallops in a shallow flameproof 1-1/2 quart casserole dish.
4. Mix together remaining ingredients and pour over scallops.
5. Broil 6 inches from heat until scallops are opaque, 4 to 5 minutes.
6. Sprinkle crumb mixture evenly over scallops and broil until crisp and lightly browned, about 1 minute longer.
